text: Just as Jonah Kramer had conducted ice-themed music performances, these sculptors had found a way to express beauty through a medium as fleeting as ice. The parallel struck Jonah Kramer deeply, igniting a spark of inspiration for future compositions. As the ice sculpture exhibition came to a close on May 11, 2026, Jonah Kramer lingered in Washington Square Park, reluctant to leave.
context: Jonah Kramer reflects on the ice sculpture exhibition, drawing parallels to his own artistic endeavors and feeling inspired as the event concludes.
